infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PatchPoint uses the camera to detect potholes in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PatchPoint uses your location to tag detected potholes on the map.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: PatchPoint uses the accelerometer to confirm pothole hits via vibration analysis.

plugins.cameraPermission: PatchPoint uses the camera to detect potholes in real-time.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PatchPoint uses your location to tag detected potholes on the map.
